feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Batch managing in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a BOM and its components are batch managed. The finished item is also a batch managed.

How can I manage the batch's transactions in easy way and assign batch of component to batch of finished item?

I have SAP B1 10. In Administration -> System Initialization -> General settings -> Inventory -> Management Method is "On every transaction"

I hope I was clear enough and I was able to explain the issue.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to link my new staff certificate to company?
entry.content:
Dear member,

May I ask for your help on "linking my new staff certificate to our company profile in SAP"?

entry.title: SAP B1: Duplicated Windows in ALT+TAB
entry.content:
I've got this duplicated windows while pressing ALT+TAB. It starts from 1 windows, but sometimes, if I press ALT+TAB to switch across windows, a duplicated window comes and it can go over 10+ windows. If there's any solution, please kindly enlighten me. Thank you in advance.

Windows 11 Home 24H2 26100.3775 Windows Feature Experience Pack 1000.26100.66.0

entry.title: Need SAPB1 TABLE NAME INFORMATION.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please provide the information of the path with the SAP table name.

  1. In which table are landing charges mentioned? Please tell me the table name.

  2. Where are the expenses mentioned? In which table name?

  3. In which table is printing & stationery mentioned?

  4. Please provide the table name where the currency is listed.

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.title: RSP create duplicate instance backups
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having an issue where 2 and sometimes 3 instance backups are created. 
RSP Backups are enabled:



For the past week it has been creating 2 instance backups daily, and yesterday 3 backups. 
It has happened before, but then goes back to creating a single backup daily. I am not sure what is causing this. 
I updated the RSP about a month ago to the latest patch, hoping it would resolve the issue. But it hasn't, and the schema backups stopped working as well. (scheduled the backups in the SLD now) 

Any help is always appreciated.
Thank you all,
Jerusha

entry.title: System standard Inventory Aging Crystal Report
entry.content:
Hi All

It is not possible to edit the System standard Inventory Aging Crystal Report Design to show Vendor Name from GRPO and summarize Quantity by Vendor right?

The Crystal Report Design consists of unknown Table Fields and look restrictive like Print Layout Design?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: SAP Process Improvement Suggestion – Payment Received at One Location, Material Sales at Multiple Lo
entry.content:
SAP Process Improvement Suggestion – Payment Received at One Location, Material Sales at Multiple Locations

In our current SAP setup, when a payment is received at a single location but the sales are made from multiple locations, the accounts team needs to manually split the payment and book multiple transactions based on the respective sales locations. This leads to extra effort, potential errors, and inefficiencies in reconciliation.

Suggested Improvement:
Introduce a "Single Click Payment Split by Location" functionality in SAP, where:

  • The system automatically identifies the sales locations related to the payment.

  • It enables the accounts team to split and assign the received amount location-wise with just one action.

  • This ensures accurate financial reporting, faster processing, and reduced manual intervention.

 Benefits:

  • Simplifies the workflow for the accounts team

  • Improves data accuracy and audit trail

  • Enhances visibility of payment allocation across locations

Would love to hear thoughts from fellow SAP users or consultants – has anyone implemented something similar?

entry.title: Error while Enabling Advance GL Account option - the number of expanded account determination rules
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working with SAP Business One version 10.0 and I'm trying to insert Advanced G/L Account Determination Rules, but I receive the following error the i Cannot migrate data: the number of expanded account determination rules exceeds the allowed limit.

I understand that the system has a limit of 4,000 expanded rules, but I'm not sure if this limit has changed in version 10.0 or later.

- Does anyone know if the limit of 4,000 expanded rules is still valid in the latest version?

- Is there a way to view how many rules i have got?

Thanks

entry.title: Old Memo Text Appearing on Top of All Journal Entries - SAP B1 Bug?
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I'm experiencing a strange issue in SAP Business One.
In journal entries, a specific memo line from a previous entry (for example: ZİRAAT 15002 NOLU YATIRIM KREDISI 49/108 TKST ÖDEMESİ) appears above the actual memo of the current journal entry (for example: ZİRAAT 15002 NOLU YATIRIM KREDISI 56/108 TKST ÖDEMESİ), and this happens in every journal entry.
Even though the actual memo for each entry is correct, this old memo is constantly displayed at the top of the screen for every journal entry.

It seems like some kind of system bug.
How can I fix this?
For example;

entry.title: Upgrade the apache tomcat embedded in Integration Framework
entry.content:
Hi all,

One of our customers has SAP Business One 10 FP2102 and Integration Framework (version 1.22.34 which is from that package) installed in separated servers. Due to security reasons the customer requires to upgrade the version of the Apache Tomcat which is running the B1iF service at least to version 8.5.94. The version of Tomcat that is installed with B1iF is 8.5.51 but the challenge is Tomcat is embedded in the B1iF installation.

Is it possible to upgrade to a newer version the Apache Tomcat embedded in the B1iF Server?

entry.title: How to install DTW on client/workstation PC's with SAP Business One 10.0
entry.content:
I need to use DTW on client PCs for daily tasks.
I checked b1_shr and did not find DTW's setup.exe.
I checked the SAP Business One Administrator's Guide but didn't find any useful information. Should I install it using the complete B1 installation package? But how can I install only DTW?

We are using SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit) for windows.

entry.title: Can't set series when creating a Project Management on Service Layer
entry.content:
When creating a Project Management object via Service Layer, even though I set the series on the body, it is ignores it and sets the default one.

There's no issue doing this via SAP, but I don't seem to be able to set it when creating it on a Service Layer POST call.

entry.title: in sap b1 hana verision hana in suse is not connecting even after restart Hdbad what should i do
entry.content: in sap b1 hana verision hana in suse is not connecting even after restart Hdbad what should i do

entry.title: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server
entry.content:
Hello, 
I need help in analizing Log-File which was created from SAP Business One Setup for FP2502

Our Server: 
WIN 2022
SQL 2019
Dot.net 4.8
ODBC for SQL-Server
ODBC Driver 17

During setup SLD it fails... 
I have tested via "Setup.exe" and Components-Wizzard
(Screenshot is attached)

I have saved here the LogFile.

as a workarround, i tried the upgrade function:

I have installed SAP FP2208... Works fine.
but Upgrade to FP2408 or FP2502 fails at the same place.



Can you help me to find out, why I can't make the clean installation of FP2502 ?

Thank you very much.

Greetings
Markus

entry.title: Modify form pick pack and production manager
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to modify the pick pack and production manager form, addin a new column to the grid? I mean, using UI API. One of our customer needs to add a new column to calculate some values. Thank you.

entry.title: Inactive GL Account in Trial Balance
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it not possible to suppress Inactive GL Accounts in Trial Balance?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: List of Cost Center Codes unlimited
entry.content:
Hi All

Is the list of Cost Center Codes unlimited as we are using Dimension 5 as line number sequence for customized stored procedure to show Sub ledger line remarks in General Ledger.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Facing issue of email alerts are not able to send.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
Please note that, the customer is not on active support from SAP hence we are not able to upgrade the database.
 
We are facing issue of email alerts are not able to send. 
 
We have done the following.
 
- SLD alert setting is enabled
- All SAP services are running
- Restarted Job services & Service layer
- Alert Query is showing result
-Alert user id unlocked & have super user rights.
 
Regards
Abdul.

entry.title: Support on a query
entry.content:
Greetings of the day.

Following is the query.

SELECT T0.[DocNum], T0.DocDate,T1.[ShipDate], T0.CardName, T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription], T1.[Quantity], T2.[Code], (T2.[Quantity]*T1.[OpenQty]) 'Requirement',(Select T3.OnHand from OITW T3 where T3.ItemCode=T2.Code and T3.whscode='WH-WIP') 'In Stock',
(Select T3.IsCommited from OITM T3 where T3.ItemCode=T2.Code) 'Committed',
(Select T3.OnOrder from OITM T3 where T3.ItemCode=T2.Code)'PO',' ' as DataFROM ORDR T0 INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] inner join ITT1 T2 on T2.Father =T1.ItemCode WHERE T1.[OpenQty] >0 and T0.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T0.[DocDate] <=[%1]

Need to pickup the value from the Default warehouse of the Item Code as it is picking up the total from all warehouse.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Updating ElecCommMessage on a Delivery Note using DI-API
entry.content:
Greetings,

I'm developing a software that will communicate certain documents to the Portuguese tax authority, and i need to update the electronic document status and message with the return.

However i noticed that the ElecCommMessage field in the DI-API is read-only.

I have also tried updating EDocErrorCode and ElecCommMessage, but i get the following error message:

[ODLN.EDocErrCod][line: 1] , 'Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)'

I have also tried updating the same field using the service layer without success.

Has anyone updated these fields using DI-API or service layer? How can i do it?
